# AGENTS.md — homebrew-lynxprompt

## Project Overview

Homebrew tap for LynxPrompt. AI configuration blueprint manager for AGENTS.md and CLAUDE.md files.

- **Repo:** [GeiserX/homebrew-lynxprompt](https://github.com/GeiserX/homebrew-lynxprompt)
- **Language:** Ruby
- **License:** GPL-3.0

## Architecture

Standard Homebrew tap with formula definitions in `Formula/`.

### Key Files

- `Formula/lynxprompt.rb` — Homebrew formula

## Usage

```bash
brew tap GeiserX/homebrew-lynxprompt
brew install lynxprompt
```
